# Requirements Checklist: Boss Office Phase Completion

**Purpose**: Validate all functional requirements, success criteria, and user stories are implemented for Boss Office completion
**Created**: 2026-01-22
**Feature**: [spec.md](./spec.md)

**Note**: This checklist is generated by the `/speckit.specify` command based on feature requirements. Check items off as completed using `[x]`.

## User Story 1: Upload Document and Trigger Tool Generation (P1)

- [ ] US1-001: Boss can drag and drop .txt files into upload dropzone
- [ ] US1-002: Boss can drag and drop .md files into upload dropzone
- [ ] US1-003: Boss can drag and drop .pdf files into upload dropzone
- [ ] US1-004: Boss can drag and drop .docx files into upload dropzone
- [ ] US1-005: Upload dropzone shows filename preview when file is selected
- [ ] US1-006: Upload form has tool_purpose text input field
- [ ] US1-007: Upload form has client_name text input field
- [ ] US1-008: Upload button is disabled until file, tool_purpose, and client_name are provided
- [ ] US1-009: System validates file type and rejects .exe and other invalid formats with error message
- [ ] US1-010: System shows upload progress indicator during file processing
- [ ] US1-011: System calls n8n Worker webhook with tool_purpose, client_name, and source_document
- [ ] US1-012: Uploaded tool appears in dashboard with status "pending_review" after QA approval
- [ ] US1-013: Tool in dashboard shows correct tool_purpose and client_name from upload

## User Story 2: Preview Generated Tool in Multiple Responsive Modes (P2)

- [ ] US2-001: Tool detail page has "Preview" button
- [ ] US2-002: Clicking Preview button opens modal with iframe containing generated_html
- [ ] US2-003: Preview modal has Desktop/Tablet/Mobile mode toggle buttons
- [ ] US2-004: Desktop mode shows iframe at 100% width
- [ ] US2-005: Tablet mode shows iframe at 768px width
- [ ] US2-006: Mobile mode shows iframe at 375px width
- [ ] US2-007: Preview iframe has sandbox="allow-scripts allow-same-origin" attribute
- [ ] US2-008: Preview modal has close button (X icon)
- [ ] US2-009: Clicking outside modal closes preview
- [ ] US2-010: Preview loads generated HTML in under 2 seconds

## User Story 3: Approve Tool for Deployment (P2)

- [ ] US3-001: Tool detail page shows "Approve & Deploy" button when status is "pending_review"
- [ ] US3-002: Clicking "Approve & Deploy" triggers loading state and disables button
- [ ] US3-003: System calls n8n deployment webhook with tool_id, generated_html, tool_purpose
- [ ] US3-004: Tool status updates to "deployed" after successful deployment
- [ ] US3-005: Tool detail page shows deployed_url after deployment
- [ ] US3-006: Tool detail page shows github_commit_sha after deployment
- [ ] US3-007: Deployed_url link opens in new tab
- [ ] US3-008: System shows error message with retry option if deployment fails
- [ ] US3-009: Failed deployment keeps tool status as "pending_review"
- [ ] US3-010: Success toast notification appears after successful deployment

## User Story 4: Reject Tool with Feedback (P3)

- [ ] US4-001: Tool detail page shows "Reject" button when status is "pending_review"
- [ ] US4-002: Clicking "Reject" opens modal with feedback textarea
- [ ] US4-003: Feedback textarea is required before confirming rejection
- [ ] US4-004: Confirming rejection updates tool status to "rejected"
- [ ] US4-005: Boss feedback is saved to boss_feedback field
- [ ] US4-006: boss_reviewed_at timestamp is set to current time
- [ ] US4-007: Rejected tool disappears from "Pending Review" filter
- [ ] US4-008: Closing reject modal without submitting keeps status "pending_review"

## User Story 5: Request Tool Revision with Change Instructions (P3)

- [ ] US5-001: Tool detail page shows "Request Revision" button when status is "pending_review"
- [ ] US5-002: Clicking "Request Revision" opens modal with change instructions textarea
- [ ] US5-003: Change instructions textarea is required before submitting
- [ ] US5-004: Submitting revision request calls n8n revision webhook with tool_id and boss_feedback
- [ ] US5-005: Tool status updates to "revision_requested" after submitting
- [ ] US5-006: Revision requested tool shows loading indicator
- [ ] US5-007: After AI regenerates tool, it returns through QA workflow with status "pending_review"
- [ ] US5-008: Revision count increments in revision_history array
- [ ] US5-009: System shows error message if revision webhook fails

## User Story 6: Receive QA-Approved Tools via Webhook (P1)

- [ ] US6-001: Backend has POST /api/boss/webhooks/tool-ready endpoint
- [ ] US6-002: Webhook validates required fields: tool_id, generated_html, qa_score
- [ ] US6-003: Webhook returns 400 Bad Request if required fields are missing
- [ ] US6-004: Webhook checks for duplicate tool_id in MongoDB
- [ ] US6-005: Webhook returns 409 Conflict if tool_id already exists
- [ ] US6-006: Valid webhook payload is stored in MongoDB fast_track_tools.tools collection
- [ ] US6-007: Tool is stored with status "pending_review"
- [ ] US6-008: Tool is stored with generated_timestamp set to current time
- [ ] US6-009: Webhook returns 200 OK after successful storage
- [ ] US6-010: New tool appears in dashboard within 7 seconds (polling interval)

## User Story 7: Apply Fast Track Branding Throughout UI (P3)

- [ ] US7-001: Dashboard uses only #000000, #FFFFFF, #FFF469 colors
- [ ] US7-002: Dashboard headings use Plaak font with bold weight
- [ ] US7-003: Dashboard body text uses Riforma font
- [ ] US7-004: Tool cards have 3px black borders
- [ ] US7-005: Tool cards have white backgrounds
- [ ] US7-006: Tool cards have yellow accent highlights
- [ ] US7-007: Primary CTA buttons have yellow background (#FFF469) with black text
- [ ] US7-008: Secondary buttons have black background with white text
- [ ] US7-009: Upload page dropzone has bold black border
- [ ] US7-010: Upload page dropzone has yellow highlight on drag-over
- [ ] US7-011: Preview modal has minimalist black border
- [ ] US7-012: Preview modal has white background
- [ ] US7-013: Preview modal close button has yellow accent
- [ ] US7-014: Tool detail page follows Fast Track branding
- [ ] US7-015: All UI components have clear visual hierarchy

## Functional Requirements: File Upload (FR-001 to FR-004)

- [ ] FR-001: POST /api/boss/upload endpoint exists
- [ ] FR-002: Upload endpoint accepts multipart/form-data
- [ ] FR-003: Upload endpoint accepts file, tool_purpose, client_name fields
- [ ] FR-004: System parses .txt files to extract text
- [ ] FR-005: System parses .md files to extract text
- [ ] FR-006: System parses .pdf files using pdf-parse library
- [ ] FR-007: System parses .docx files using mammoth library
- [ ] FR-008: System validates uploaded files are under 10MB
- [ ] FR-009: System rejects files over 10MB with error message
- [ ] FR-010: System calls N8N_WORKER_WEBHOOK_URL after parsing
- [ ] FR-011: Worker webhook receives tool_purpose, client_name, source_document

## Functional Requirements: Webhook Receiver (FR-005 to FR-008)

- [ ] FR-012: POST /api/boss/webhooks/tool-ready endpoint exists
- [ ] FR-013: Webhook accepts tool_id, generated_html, qa_score, qa_feedback
- [ ] FR-014: Webhook accepts tool_purpose, client_name, document_type, source_document
- [ ] FR-015: Webhook validates tool_id is present
- [ ] FR-016: Webhook validates generated_html is present
- [ ] FR-017: Webhook validates qa_score is present
- [ ] FR-018: Webhook returns 400 Bad Request for missing fields with descriptive error
- [ ] FR-019: Webhook checks tool_id uniqueness in MongoDB
- [ ] FR-020: Webhook returns 409 Conflict for duplicate tool_id
- [ ] FR-021: Webhook stores tool with status "pending_review"
- [ ] FR-022: Webhook stores tool with generated_timestamp = current time

## Functional Requirements: Preview (FR-009 to FR-011)

- [ ] FR-023: GET /api/boss/tools/:tool_id/preview endpoint exists
- [ ] FR-024: Preview endpoint returns generated_html
- [ ] FR-025: Preview endpoint sets Content-Type: text/html header
- [ ] FR-026: Frontend displays preview in iframe element
- [ ] FR-027: iframe has sandbox="allow-scripts allow-same-origin" attribute
- [ ] FR-028: Preview offers Desktop mode (100% width)
- [ ] FR-029: Preview offers Tablet mode (768px width)
- [ ] FR-030: Preview offers Mobile mode (375px width)

## Functional Requirements: Approve/Reject/Revision (FR-012 to FR-016)

- [ ] FR-031: PUT /api/boss/tools/:tool_id/approve endpoint exists
- [ ] FR-032: Approve endpoint updates status to "approved"
- [ ] FR-033: Approve endpoint updates boss_review_status to "approved"
- [ ] FR-034: Approve endpoint calls N8N_DEPLOY_WEBHOOK_URL
- [ ] FR-035: Deployment webhook receives tool_id, generated_html, tool_purpose
- [ ] FR-036: Approve endpoint updates deployed_url from webhook response
- [ ] FR-037: Approve endpoint updates github_commit_sha from webhook response
- [ ] FR-038: Approve endpoint updates deployed_at timestamp
- [ ] FR-039: PUT /api/boss/tools/:tool_id/reject endpoint exists
- [ ] FR-040: Reject endpoint accepts boss_feedback parameter
- [ ] FR-041: Reject endpoint updates status to "rejected"
- [ ] FR-042: Reject endpoint updates boss_feedback field
- [ ] FR-043: Reject endpoint updates boss_reviewed_at timestamp
- [ ] FR-044: PUT /api/boss/tools/:tool_id/request-revision endpoint exists
- [ ] FR-045: Revision endpoint accepts boss_feedback parameter
- [ ] FR-046: Revision endpoint calls n8n revision webhook (if implemented)
- [ ] FR-047: Revision endpoint updates status to "revision_requested"

## Functional Requirements: Authentication & UI (FR-017 to FR-025)

- [ ] FR-048: All API endpoints validate Clerk JWT authentication
- [ ] FR-049: All API endpoints check Boss email whitelist
- [ ] FR-050: Upload UI has drag-and-drop functionality
- [ ] FR-051: Upload UI shows visual feedback for drag-over state
- [ ] FR-052: Upload UI shows upload progress percentage
- [ ] FR-053: Upload UI shows spinner during processing
- [ ] FR-054: Dashboard polls backend every 7 seconds using React Query
- [ ] FR-055: Tool detail page shows tool_id
- [ ] FR-056: Tool detail page shows tool_purpose
- [ ] FR-057: Tool detail page shows client_name
- [ ] FR-058: Tool detail page shows qa_score
- [ ] FR-059: Tool detail page shows qa_feedback
- [ ] FR-060: Tool detail page shows status
- [ ] FR-061: Tool detail page shows generated_timestamp
- [ ] FR-062: Tool detail page shows boss_reviewed_at (if exists)
- [ ] FR-063: Tool detail page shows action buttons based on status
- [ ] FR-064: System shows success toast on approve/reject/revision completion
- [ ] FR-065: System shows error messages with retry options on failures

## Success Criteria Validation

- [ ] SC-001: Upload completes with success message in under 5 seconds (tested)
- [ ] SC-002: Tools appear in dashboard within 7 seconds of webhook (tested)
- [ ] SC-003: Preview loads in all three modes in under 2 seconds (tested)
- [ ] SC-004: Approve returns deployed_url within 90 seconds (tested)
- [ ] SC-005: Rejected tool disappears from Pending Review filter (tested)
- [ ] SC-006: PDF parsing achieves 95% accuracy with 20 test documents
- [ ] SC-007: DOCX parsing achieves 95% accuracy with paragraph preservation
- [ ] SC-008: File size validation rejects 10MB+ files in under 1 second (tested)
- [ ] SC-009: Webhook receiver processes payloads in under 500ms average (tested)
- [ ] SC-010: Invalid webhook payloads return 400 with descriptive errors (tested)
- [ ] SC-011: Fast Track branded components pass visual design review
- [ ] SC-012: Actions show loading states and complete in under 3 seconds (tested)
- [ ] SC-013: System handles 10 concurrent webhooks without corruption (tested)
- [ ] SC-014: Upload progress indicator accurately reflects stages (tested)
- [ ] SC-015: Preview iframe sandbox prevents XSS attacks (tested with malicious HTML)

## Edge Cases Validation

- [ ] EDGE-001: 50MB PDF upload is rejected with clear error message
- [ ] EDGE-002: Worker webhook timeout (60s) shows error with retry option
- [ ] EDGE-003: Multiple simultaneous webhooks handled without duplicates (MongoDB constraint)
- [ ] EDGE-004: Double-approve attempt returns 409 Conflict
- [ ] EDGE-005: Invalid deployed_url shows warning icon "Deployment may be propagating"
- [ ] EDGE-006: Network drop during upload shows error with retry option
- [ ] EDGE-007: DOCX with only images returns validation error "Must contain text"
- [ ] EDGE-008: Preview with infinite loop JavaScript is contained by iframe sandbox

## Technical Implementation

- [ ] TECH-001: multer middleware configured for file uploads (max 10MB)
- [ ] TECH-002: pdf-parse library installed and configured
- [ ] TECH-003: mammoth library installed and configured
- [ ] TECH-004: Upload endpoint stores files temporarily during processing
- [ ] TECH-005: Upload endpoint cleans up temporary files after processing
- [ ] TECH-006: Webhook receiver has proper error handling and logging
- [ ] TECH-007: MongoDB indexes created for tool_id (unique) and status
- [ ] TECH-008: React Query configured with 7-second refetchInterval
- [ ] TECH-009: Frontend toast notification system implemented
- [ ] TECH-010: Environment variables documented for N8N_WORKER_WEBHOOK_URL
- [ ] TECH-011: Environment variables documented for N8N_DEPLOY_WEBHOOK_URL
- [ ] TECH-012: Environment variables documented for N8N_REVISION_WEBHOOK_URL

## Notes

- Check items off as completed using `[x]`
- Add test results, findings, or issues inline as comments
- Link to relevant code files or documentation
- Items are numbered sequentially for easy reference
- This checklist covers all 7 user stories, 25 functional requirements, 15 success criteria, and 8 edge cases
